name: cabione-custom-order-designer
description: Cabione custom bathroom furniture order designer

scripts.check: node --check src/main.js && node --check src/workflow.js && node --check docker/static-server.mjs
scripts.build: npm run check && npm run lint && npm test
scripts.vercel:build: rm -rf dist && mkdir -p dist && cp index.html dist/index.html && cp -R src dist/src
